_comment: Example SHS campaign spec. Copy, then fill in REAL binary paths, seeds, and flags for your machine. Template vars substituted by the orchestrator: {target} {out} {duration} {run} {cache} {cost}. Edit the commands to match how YOU invoke KOFTA / Wei-fuzz; the values below are illustrative, not verified invocations.

commands.llmonly: kofta-llmconfig --source src/{target} --out {out}/params.xml && timeout {duration} wei-fuzz -i seeds/{target} -o {out} -x {out}/params.xml -- bin/{target} @@
commands.kshs: timeout {duration} env KOFTA_SHS=1 KOFTA_SHS_BUDGET=60 KOFTA_SHS_MODEL=claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 KOFTA_SHS_CACHE={cache} KOFTA_SHS_COST={cost} ./afl-fuzz -i seeds/{target} -o {out} -- bin/{target}.kofta @@
commands.kshsng: timeout {duration} env KOFTA_SHS=1 KOFTA_SHS_NOSLICE=1 KOFTA_SHS_BUDGET=60 KOFTA_SHS_MODEL=claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 KOFTA_SHS_CACHE={cache} KOFTA_SHS_COST={cost} ./afl-fuzz -i seeds/{target} -o {out} -- bin/{target}.kofta @@
